Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/anthropic-vacancies/nautilus-vs-camel/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "nautilus-vs-camel"
tags:
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. nautilus-vs-camel

_Файлов:_ 6

h2. Содержание

* [[00-question-camel-vs-nautilus|00-question-camel-vs-nautilus.md]] — 
* [[01-passive-vs-active-roles|01-passive-vs-active-roles.md]] —

* [[03-sgb-advocate-colleague-example|03-sgb-advocate-colleague-example.md]] — 
* [[04-what-to-take-from-info-repos|04-what-to-take-from-info-repos.md]] — 
* [[05-what-to-do-right-now|05-what-to-do-right-now.md]] — > [!TIP]
